description: Advanced Recommendation Engine (packages/recommendations) + Data Pipeline & ETL (packages/data-pipeline) - Two packages in one feature. Recommendations: collaborative filtering, content-based filtering, hybrid engine, matrix factorization (ALS), neural collaborative filtering, cold start handling, diversity injection, real-time personalization, A/B testing, feedback loops, cross-app recommendations, trending detection, context-aware, explanation generation. Data Pipeline: event streams, ETL builder, data validation, dead letter queue, batch scheduler, real-time aggregation, warehouse schema, dashboard materialization, behavior aggregation, retention metrics, revenue metrics, growth metrics, funnel data.
steps: Create packages/recommendations/src/types.ts with interfaces: UserProfile, ItemProfile, SimilarityScore, RecommendationResult, CollaborativeConfig, ContentFilterConfig, HybridConfig, MatrixFactorizationConfig, LatentFactor, NCFConfig, ColdStartConfig, DiversityConfig, SessionContext, ABTestConfig, FeedbackEvent, CrossAppConfig, TrendingConfig, VelocityScore, ContextConfig, ExplanationConfig, Explanation (200+ lines)

Create packages/recommendations/src/core/collaborative-filtering.ts - CollaborativeFilter class with user-user similarity (cosine, pearson), item-item similarity, k-nearest neighbors, rating prediction, neighborhood selection (300+ lines)

Create packages/recommendations/src/core/content-based-filter.ts - ContentBasedFilter class with TF-IDF calculation, cosine similarity, feature extraction, user profile building, content scoring, keyword weighting (300+ lines)

Create packages/recommendations/src/core/hybrid-engine.ts - HybridEngine class combining collaborative + content-based, weighted blending, cascade ranking, switching based on confidence, meta-learner (250+ lines)

Create packages/recommendations/src/core/matrix-factorization.ts - MatrixFactorizer class with ALS (Alternating Least Squares) algorithm, latent factor extraction, regularization, convergence detection, implicit feedback handling (350+ lines)

Create packages/recommendations/src/core/neural-cf.ts - NeuralCF class simulating neural collaborative filtering with embedding layers, MLP layers, activation functions, forward pass, loss calculation, gradient concept (300+ lines)

Create packages/recommendations/src/core/cold-start-handler.ts - ColdStartHandler class with popularity-based fallback, demographic similarity, onboarding preference collection, exploration vs exploitation (250+ lines)

Create packages/recommendations/src/core/diversity-injector.ts - DiversityInjector class with maximal marginal relevance (MMR), category diversification, serendipity scoring, novelty detection, bubble-breaking (250+ lines)

Create packages/recommendations/src/core/realtime-personalizer.ts - RealtimePersonalizer class with session-based scoring, recency weighting, click-stream processing, bandits (epsilon-greedy, UCB), contextual features (300+ lines)

Create packages/recommendations/src/core/recommendation-ab.ts - RecommendationABTest class with variant assignment, metric tracking (CTR, engagement time, conversion), statistical significance testing, winner selection (250+ lines)

Create packages/recommendations/src/core/feedback-processor.ts - FeedbackProcessor class with implicit signal processing (views, time, scrolls), explicit signal handling (likes, ratings), decay functions, signal normalization (250+ lines)

Create packages/recommendations/src/core/cross-app-recommender.ts - CrossAppRecommender class with cross-domain interest mapping, shared user embeddings, app-specific filtering, unified preference graph (250+ lines)

Create packages/recommendations/src/core/trending-detector.ts - TrendingDetector class with velocity scoring, exponential decay, viral coefficient calculation, breakout detection, category-relative trending (250+ lines)
Create packages/recommendations/src/core/context-engine.ts - ContextEngine class with time-of-day features, device features, location features, seasonal patterns, social context signals (200+ lines)

Create packages/recommendations/src/core/explanation-generator.ts - ExplanationGenerator class with rule-based explanations, feature attribution, counterfactual reasoning, natural language templates (200+ lines)
Create packages/recommendations/src/index.ts barrel export for all 14 modules

Create packages/data-pipeline/src/types.ts with interfaces: EventMessage, Partition, Consumer, Producer, ETLStage, ExtractConfig, TransformConfig, LoadConfig, Pipeline, ValidationSchema, DeadLetterEntry, BatchJob, ScheduleConfig, AggregationWindow, TimeWindow, AggregateResult, WarehouseTable, FactTable, DimensionTable, MaterializedView, BehaviorEvent, RetentionCohort, RevenueMetric, GrowthMetric, FunnelStage (200+ lines)

Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/event-stream.ts - EventStream class with producer/consumer pattern, partitioning (hash, round-robin), consumer groups, offset management, replay capability, backpressure (350+ lines)

Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/etl-builder.ts - ETLPipeline class with fluent builder pattern, extract/transform/load stages, parallel execution, error handling, checkpointing, resumability (300+ lines)

Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/data-validator.ts - DataValidator class with schema enforcement, type coercion, null handling, referential integrity checks, anomaly detection, quarantine (250+ lines)

Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/dead-letter-queue.ts - DeadLetterQueue class with failed message storage, retry scheduling, poison pill detection, alerting, manual replay, DLQ analytics (200+ lines)

Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/batch-scheduler.ts - BatchScheduler class with cron-like scheduling, dependency DAG, parallel execution, resource limits, priority queues, SLA monitoring (250+ lines)

Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/realtime-aggregator.ts - RealtimeAggregator class with tumbling/sliding/session windows, incremental computation, late arrival handling, watermarks, exactly-once semantics simulation (300+ lines)

Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/warehouse-schema.ts - WarehouseSchema class with star schema definition, fact/dimension tables, slowly changing dimensions, surrogate keys, grain definition (250+ lines)

Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/dashboard-materializer.ts - DashboardMaterializer class with view definitions, refresh scheduling, incremental updates, cache management, query optimization (250+ lines)

Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/behavior-aggregator.ts - BehaviorAggregator class with session reconstruction, journey mapping, engagement scoring, feature extraction, user segmentation (250+ lines)

Create packages/data-pipeline/src/core/metrics-calculator.ts - MetricsCalculator class with DAU/MAU/WAU, retention (day-1, day-7, day-30), stickiness (DAU/MAU), churn rate, LTV estimation, cohort metrics, funnel conversion (350+ lines)
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/index.ts barrel export for all 10 modules
acceptance_criteria: Collaborative filtering implements actual cosine similarity calculation
Matrix factorization implements real ALS iterative algorithm
Event stream implements actual partition assignment logic
Metrics calculator computes real retention and growth formulas
Running node scripts/test.js passes with both new packages detected
verification: find packages/recommendations -name '*.ts' | wc -l should show 16 files
find packages/data-pipeline -name '*.ts' | wc -l should show 12 files
